```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r, eval=FALSE}
devtools::install_github("iqis/rty")
```

```{r}
api  <- '<yourAPI>'
# https://artifactory.bayer.com/ui/admin/artifactory/user_profile
```


```{r}
repo <- "bmdi_martini"

# set repo details and credentials
rty::set_repo(
  rty::repo(
    name = repo,
    root = "https://artifactory.bayer.com/artifactory/"
  )
)

rty::set_cred(rty::api_key(api))

rty_profile <- rty::profile(
  rty::get_repo(), 
  rty::get_cred()
)
```


```{r}
# Deploy a package to artifactory
rty::deploy(
  "../../martini_0.4.0.tar.gz", 
  rty_profile
)
```
